# Carl Simmons

First mentioned: **3301-06-30**  
Last mentioned: **3302-03-23**  
Total mentions: **8**

## Related


## Biography

Carl Simmons is the Chief Medical Officer of Newton Dock in the BD-02 4304 system who led the response to the Cerberus Plague outbreak in 3301. He confirmed isolated incidents of the plague in Dajoar, Eleu and 20 Ophiuchi, believed to be travellers from BD-02 4304 before restrictions were imposed, and initiated containment operations to prevent full outbreaks.

Simmons called on independent pilots to help contain the disease and confirmed that the name "Cerberus Plague" came from the organism's unusual three-pronged structure. His leadership during the crisis exemplified the critical role of medical professionals in coordinating inter-system responses to galactic health emergencies, and his work at Newton Dock became a model for subsequent plague containment efforts.
